title: Judge Declines to Halt Meta Layoffs Challenged as AI
description: A federal judge in Oakland, Calif., on July 17, 2026, declined to temporarily block Meta Platforms from terminating 26 employees who allege the company used artificial intelligence tools to select them for layoffs because of disabilities or medical leave, according to court documents. title: AI is speeding up cancer detection and drug discovery, doctor says

title: Who benefits from AI? Cory Doctorow’s new book has an answer

title: President Murmu's Moldova Visit: A New Era of Indo-Moldovan Cooperation
description: President Droupadi Murmu's historic visit to Moldova marks a pivotal moment in Indo-Moldovan relations, with a focus on energizing economic ties through trade, technology, and talent. The visit aims to double trade volume and fortify collaboration in sectors like artificial intelligence, IT consulting, and renewable energy.
